title: Pointblank
description:
Inspired by classic arcade shooters and action games, Pointblank drops you into a brutal minimalist arena where every enemy has to be taken down with just a single bullet. 

Pick it back up, you're going to need it.

Facing waves of increasingly relentless foes, use powerful augments (and precise aim) to rack up your score and survive just a little longer.

Adapt on the fly, achieve insane high-scores, and compete on the global leaderboards, with each encounter pushing your reflexes and accuracy to the limit. 

Gameplay Features• You have a single bullet: make sure every shot counts.

• Experiment with 20+ unique augments that help you in your runs.

• Survive endless waves of enemies in high-intensity, brutally difficult combat.

• Grind for shards to unlock augment pools by killing enemies.

• Climb the global leaderboards and compete for the highest score worldwide.

• Minimalist aesthetic with flat colors and clean visuals.

• Precision-based gameplay that rewards quick reflexes and on-the-fly decisions.
description_short: Enter a fast-paced arcade shooter with only a single bullet. Obliterate waves of enemies, unlock powerful augments, and make every shot count.
